response: The award won by only twelve people is the EGOT, which refers to the fact that Marvin Hamlisch is one of only two people (along with Richard Rodgers) to have won Emmy, Grammy, Oscar, and Tony awards, and a Pulitzer Prize. Ted Kooshian has performed with Marvin Hamlisch, who is part of the EGOT-winning group. Therefore, the award won by only twelve people that Ted Kooshian has performed with is the EGOT.
